title: Per-Currency Display — Timeline, Dashboard and Reconciliation Screens
description: Update Timeline, Dashboard, and Reconciliation screens to display amounts with their currency codes and show per-currency totals instead of a single aggregated figure.
execution_steps: Run 'loom start TASK-120' to lock active context
Run 'loom context TASK-120' to ingest requirements
- DashboardViewModelTest: AccountBalance list with mixed currencies does NOT produce a single summed total; each balance has a currencyCode
- TimelineViewModelTest: monthly group total is Map<String, Long> (per currency), not a single Long
Dashboard: Update account card Composable to display balance as '{amount} {currencyCode}' using AccountBalance.account.currency
Dashboard: If a single combined net total is currently shown, replace it with per-currency totals list (or remove if N/A)
Timeline: Update transaction row Composable to show amount with transaction's currencyCode (from account)
Timeline: Update monthly header/total row to show per-currency breakdown (e.g., '-500 EUR / -200 USD') instead of one sum
Reconciliation: Display account balance with its currencyCode next to the amount field; update ReconciliationViewModel to pass currencyCode from AccountBalance
Add `@trace TASK-120` to all modified files
Run './gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest' and confirm ALL tests (including DashboardViewModelTest, TimelineViewModelTest, ReconciliationViewModelTest) pass
definition_of_done: Dashboard account cards show balance in own currency (e.g., '1 500 EUR', '2 000 USD')
No single cross-currency sum shown anywhere in Dashboard
Timeline transaction rows show amount with currency code
Timeline monthly total shows per-currency breakdown, not a single aggregated Long
Reconciliation balance fields show the account's currency code
